## What changed

<!-- Describe the user-visible behavior and why it changed. -->

## Data and security

- [ ] Server-side authentication/authorization is enforced
- [ ] External input is validated
- [ ] Ownership checks are enforced where applicable
- [ ] No secrets or real student PII are included
- [ ] Prisma migration/seed updates are included if needed

## Quality

- [ ] Desktop and mobile behavior checked
- [ ] Empty, loading, success, and error states considered
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `docs/FEATURE_STATUS.md` is updated if feature maturity changed
- [ ] Context/decision docs are updated if architecture or workflows changed
